description:
'''UK underground rap''' (also known as '''UK underground''' or '''UK UG''') is a [[hip-hop]] music scene and style of [[UK rap]] that emerged in the United Kingdom during the late 2010s and early 2020s. It has been described by publications as the "UK's rap revolution".   

The scene differs from earlier waves of [[Underground hip-hop|underground]] UK hip-hop and is largely inspired by American [[internet rap]] genres such as [[cloud rap]], [[Plugg music|plugg]], [[Rage music|rage]] and [[Jerk (music genre)|jerk]]. Despite its "underground" label, the scene has achieved significant commercial success.  

Artists include [[Lancey Foux]], Fimiguerrero, Young Eman, SINN6R, [[EsDeeKid]], [[YT (rapper)|YT]], [[Feng (rapper)|Feng]], [[Jim Legxacy]], [[Fakemink]], [[Phreshboyswag]], [[Zukovstheworld]], [[Snoa (rapper)|Snoa]], [[John Glacier]], RenzNiro, LYAM, TR Gobrazy, [[Niko B]], [[Wraith9]], Ceebo, Svn4vr and Len.
